name: Grilled Shrimp with Tomatilla Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 pound tomatillas, papery skin removed and washed
12 pieces shrimp, head and shells on
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Preheat grill.
3. Place the roasted tomatillas and poblano pepper in a food processor or blender. Add the remaining salsa ingredients. Puree until smooth.
4. Heat the grill or grill pan until smoking, ensuring it is very clean. Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
5. Brush the shrimp with oil and sprinkle salt and pepper on all sides.
6. Place the seasoned shrimp on the grill and cook for 4 minutes on each side.
7. Serve immediately with the tomatilla salsa.
Yield: 4 servings
